indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: upholstered lounge chair
indicators.rationale: The lounge chair is not suitable for ergonomic computer use due to its softness and lack of a desk surface.

indicators.name: high-traffic public layout
indicators.rationale: The layout of the room is designed for social interaction rather than focused work, making it unsuitable for solo computer work.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work and may cause glare.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is poorly suited for solo computer work. The lack of a flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and a high-traffic layout make it unsuitable for focused knowledge work. The ambient lighting also fails to provide adequate task illumination for screen work.
